_note: Top-level {#snippet} params splice VERBATIM with token-map coverage, mirroring upstream SnippetBlock.ts (params moved as-is with source mapping). Unannotated params therefore fire TS7006 under noImplicitAny exactly like upstream — previously each unannotated param was silently widened with an appended `: any`, which was laxer than upstream AND left the spliced range without a token-map anchor so param-list diagnostics were dropped. The `pair(a = 1 < 2, b)` case locks both the defaulted-param inference (`a` infers boolean, no TS7006) and the position mapping of the second param past a `<` comparison in the default expression.
